chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8350 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.34944/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.05.2025 Mr. M. Adeel Awan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondents No.2 and 3, which is taken on record. Under instructions, learned counsel states that finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He seeks that assessment be finalized after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid, no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
